about_raw.value: Founded in 1853, the University of Melbourne is a public research university located in Melbourne, Victoria, Australia. Ranked #14 globally in QS World University Rankings 2024.
about_raw.raw_snippet: The University of Melbourne was established in 1853...

tuition_raw.value: Undergraduate Domestic (CSP): ~$4,000 - $15,000 AUD/year. Undergraduate International: ~$40,000 - $55,000 AUD/year depending on faculty (e.g. Commerce $51,000 AUD).

living_raw.value: Estimated monthly living costs in Melbourne, Australia: Rent: $1,200 AUD; Food/Groceries: $600 AUD; Transport: $150 AUD; Utilities/Internet: $200 AUD. Total: ~$2,150 AUD/month.
living_raw.raw_snippet: Students should anticipate living costs of approximately $20,000 to $25,000 AUD per year.

scholarships_raw.value: [{'name': 'Melbourne International Undergraduate Scholarship', 'value': '$10,000 AUD tuition fee remission in the first year of an undergraduate degree', 'eligibility': 'International students with excellent academic results in final high school year', 'deadline': 'No application required (automatic assessment)'}]

acceptance_raw.value: Overall acceptance rate: Approximately 70-80% for domestic undergraduates (ATAR-dependent). International admission varies strongly by degree program.
acceptance_raw.raw_snippet: Acceptance rates vary by ATAR thresholds...

employment_raw.value: 97% of graduates are employed or in further study within 6 months of completing their degree (2023 Graduate Outcomes Survey).

salary_raw.value: Median starting salary: $68,000 AUD for undergraduates. Engineering/IT graduates average $75,000 AUD (2023 Graduate Outcomes Survey).

visa_raw.value: Visa type: Subclass 500 Student Visa (Australia). Requirements: Confirmation of Enrolment (CoE), Overseas Student Health Cover (OSHC), Genuine Temporary Entrant (GTE) statement, English proficiency (IELTS/TOEFL). Processing time: 4-8 weeks.
visa_raw.raw_snippet: Most international students will need to apply for a Student visa (subclass 500)...

deadlines_raw.value: Semester 1 (Start-Year Intake) Deadline: Late November. Semester 2 (Mid-Year Intake) Deadline: Late May.
deadlines_raw.raw_snippet: Applications for Semester 1 close late November...
